name: zeroheight
long_description:
In a world where anyone can build software and sloppy products are abundant, the products that rise above the rest are the ones that solve real problems with a polished UX and strong brand identity. The key to delivering those things is a high quality, reliable, AI-optimised design system.

zeroheight enables product teams to effortlessly document, manage, and fine-tune their design systems for AI development, so that they can ship at 10x speed without compromising on user experience.
one_liner: The design system layer for coding agents
